title: Building a stronger proof layer
note: I am learning how to present shipped work with cleaner runtime sync, repo-driven branding, and sharper project storytelling.

title: Making systems feel more product-grade
note: I am tightening AWS, AI, and frontend projects so they feel like complete products instead of separate demos.

title: Using motion to support comprehension
note: I am learning how stronger motion, depth, and interface narrative can make technical work easier to read without hiding the logic.

title: Keeping repos and portfolio aligned
note: I am turning the portfolio into a cleaner operating layer for my best repos so future project updates land here with less manual cleanup.
